current_run.description: Given an N-bit secret s, find s where the function f(x) outputs 1 if the cyclic majority of bitwise products of x with itself shifted by s is 1, and 0 otherwise. Specifically, f(x) = Majority( (x_i & x_{i+s 	ext{ mod } N}) for i=0 to N-1 ) where Majority returns 1 if more than N/2 bits are 1, and 0 otherwise.
